---
title: "checking anomalies nathans analysis"
author: "Penny Hunter"
date: "2025-08-19"
output: html_document
---



```{r}
#take merged prism full dataset and remove Dongyang's KDD 

library(dplyr)

merged_prism_working <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  select(-KDD)
```


```{r}
#library(dplyr) adding back in the basic KDD calculation 

threshold <- 30  # you can change this if needed

base_GDD <- 5        # Growing Degree Day base (adjust if needed)

merged_prism_full_1 <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  mutate(
    Tmean = (prism_tmin + prism_tmax) / 2,
    
    # Killing Degree Days
    KDD = pmax(0, Tmean - threshold),
    
    # Growing Degree Days (conditional)
    GDD = case_when(
      prism_tmax < 30 & prism_tmin > 5 ~ pmax(0, Tmean - base_GDD),
      TRUE ~ 0
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-Tmean)   # drop helper column

```

```{r}
library(lubridate)
merged_prism_working <- merged_prism_full_1 %>%
  mutate(year = year(time)) %>%
  select(
    GEOID,
    time,
    year,
    prism_tmax,
    prism_tmin,
    prism_ppt,
    prism_vpdmax,
    prism_vpdmean,
    prism_vpdmin,
    KDD,
    GDD   # include if you’ve created this
  )
```


```{r}
 merged_prism_working <- merged_prism_working %>%
  group_by(GEOID, year) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_tmax   = mean(prism_tmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_tmin   = mean(prism_tmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    sum_ppt     = sum(prism_ppt, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_vpdmax = mean(prism_vpdmax, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_vpdmean= mean(prism_vpdmean, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_vpdmin = mean(prism_vpdmin, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_KDD   = sum(KDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_GDD   = sum(GDD, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
#Getting crop yield data
library(readr)
yield_benefit_model_data <- read_csv("yield-benefit-model-data.csv")
View(yield_benefit_model_data)
# Split the dataset by commodity_desc
crop_datasets <- split(yield_benefit_model_data, yield_benefit_model_data$commodity_desc)
list2env(crop_datasets, envir = .GlobalEnv)
```

```{r}
#merging yearly prism with CORN from yield benefit model 

# Merge CORN dataset with merged_prism_yearly by matching `fips` from CORN and `GEOID` from merged_prism_yearly
prism_CORN <- merge(CORN, merged_prism_working, by.x = c("fips", "year"), by.y = c("GEOID", "year"), all.x = TRUE)

prism_SOYBEANS <- merge(SOYBEANS, merged_prism_working, by.x = c("fips", "year"), by.y = c("GEOID", "year"), all.x = TRUE)

```


```{r}
#only counties with 20 or more years of historical data for SOYBEANS AND CORN

# Load dplyr if not already loaded
#library(dplyr)

# Filter prism_SOYBEANS
prism_SOYBEANS <- prism_SOYBEANS %>%
  group_by(fips) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(year) >= 20) %>%
  ungroup()

# Filter prism_CORN
prism_CORN <- prism_CORN %>%
  group_by(fips) %>%
  filter(n_distinct(year) >= 20) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Convert county to a factor if it's not already a factor (to treat it as a categorical variable)
prism_SOYBEANS$county_factor <- as.factor(prism_SOYBEANS$fips) #repeat for corn

prism_CORN$county_factor <- as.factor(prism_CORN$fips) #repeat for corn

```



```{r}
# Linear regression for irrigated yield
model_irrigated <- lm(irr~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt, data = prism_CORN)
summary(model_irrigated)
# View summary of the regression model
summary(model_irrigated)

# Linear regression for rainfed yield
model_rainfed <- lm(rainfed ~ KDD_sum_yearly + GDD_sum_yearly + prism_ppt + county_factor, data = prism_CORN)

# View summary of the rainfed regression model
summary(model_rainfed)

model_irrigated_interaction <- lm (irr ~ KDD_sum_yearly * year, data= prism_CORN)
summary(model_irrigated_interaction)
```
